sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16292" key="a)skodore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσκο-δορέω</orth>, <sense id="n16292.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flay a person and make a bag of his skin,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
